title: Decadent Canadian Lettuce Salad
description: A rich and tender Canadian dish featuring iceberg lettuce, perfect for midnight cravings, and vegan-friendly. This salad combines the freshness of lettuce with the savory flavors of Canada
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the chilled iceberg lettuce, diced apple, and chopped walnuts.
In a small bowl, whisk together the vegan mayonnaise and maple syrup until smooth.
Pour the mayonnaise mixture over the lettuce mixture and toss to combine.
Sprinkle the dried cranberries, salt, and black pepper over the top of the salad and toss again.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the salad a good toss and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Serve the salad chilled, garnished with additional chopped walnuts if desired.
